documents.author: Dr. Adams
documents.title: Penicillin allergy documented
documents.text: On 2026-01-10, patient Margaret Chen (MRN-004471) reported a rash after amoxicillin. A penicillin allergy was documented by Dr. Adams. Avoid all penicillin-class antibiotics.

documents.author: Dr. Adams
documents.title: Started lisinopril 10mg
documents.text: On 2026-02-15, Dr. Adams started Margaret Chen on lisinopril 10mg once daily for hypertension.

documents.author: Dr. Lee
documents.title: Penicillin allergy cleared after negative challenge
documents.text: On 2026-03-02, a supervised oral penicillin challenge was negative. Dr. Lee cleared the penicillin allergy. The patient may now receive penicillin-class antibiotics.

documents.author: Dr. Lee
documents.title: Switched to amlodipine 5mg
documents.text: On 2026-04-20, lisinopril was stopped due to cough and Margaret Chen was switched to amlodipine 5mg once daily by Dr. Lee.

documents.author: Dr. Patel
documents.title: New diagnosis: type 2 diabetes
documents.text: On 2026-05-11, HbA1c was 7.4%. Dr. Patel diagnosed Margaret Chen with type 2 diabetes and started lifestyle counseling.
